category.scope_note: Industrial electric motor comparison focused on Chile market access, SEC mandatory stamp, and CNE energy efficiency requirements.

title.en: China-to-Chile Industrial Motor Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国工业电动机进入智利：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國工業電動機進入智利：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China industrial electric motor documentation against Chile SEC mandatory stamp, NCh/IEC 60034 safety, and CNE energy efficiency expectations.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国工业电动机文件与智利SEC强制认证章、NCh/IEC 60034安全及CNE能效要求差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國工業電動機文件與智利SEC強制認證章、NCh/IEC 60034安全及CNE能效要求差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, SEC approval, customs determination, energy-efficiency approval, or market-access approval. Exporters and importers should verify current Chilean SEC, INN, CNE, customs, and national market-surveillance requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or placing on the market.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、SEC批准、海关裁定、能效批准或市场准入批准。出口商和进口商在出货或投放市场前应与合格专业人士核验现行智利SEC、INN、CNE、海关及国家市场监管要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、SEC批准、海關裁定、能效批准或市場准入批准。出口商和進口商在出貨或投放市場前應與合格專業人士核驗現行智利SEC、INN、CNE、海關及國家市場監管要求。

answer_first.en: SEC mandatory stamp and manufacturer registration are the primary market-access gaps; CCC is not recognised. Grid voltage and frequency (380 V / 50 Hz) match China, so no electrical re-engineering is needed.
answer_first.zh: SEC强制认证章及制造商注册是主要市场准入差距；CCC不被智利认可。电网电压与频率（380 V / 50 Hz）与中国相同，无需重新进行电气设计。
answer_first.zht: SEC強制認證章及製造商註冊是主要市場准入差距；CCC不被智利認可。電網電壓與頻率（380 V / 50 Hz）與中國相同，無需重新進行電氣設計。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be set to true.
